in_scope: persist topic_id and deliverable_id on deliverable-scope run records so runtime watch can verify the canonical workspace/topic/deliverable/run quartet instead of trusting an implicit convention
make runtimeWatch fail closed when a persisted or preloaded run does not match the requested topic_id and deliverable_id
keep CLI review watch and MCP runtime_watch on the same fail-closed quartet locator truth as the shared runtimeWatch gateway action
keep auditDeliverable, runtimeWatch, getReviewState, and getPublicationProjection aligned on the same governance summaries while tightening run-boundary identity integrity
out_of_scope: paper_poster or conference_poster academic poster advancement
hidden fallback chains as main behavior

run_locator_integrity_surface.persisted_run_rule: when workspaceRoot/topicId/deliverableId/runId are supplied, the loaded run must carry matching topic_id and deliverable_id or runtimeWatch fails closed
run_locator_integrity_surface.preloaded_run_rule: run remains an explicit in-process input, but when combined with workspaceRoot/topicId/deliverableId it must also carry matching topic_id and deliverable_id
run_locator_integrity_surface.deliverable_watch_without_run_rule: when workspaceRoot/topicId/deliverableId are supplied without runId or run, runtimeWatch remains a deliverable-level review watch surface and does not require run identity fields

required_commands: node --test tests/runtime-alignment-p0.test.ts tests/phase-2-runtime-watch-locator-integrity-hardening.test.ts tests/runtime-protocol-workspace.test.ts tests/runtime-deliverable-route.test.ts tests/deliverable-review-loop.test.ts tests/cli-v2-smoke.test.ts tests/product-domain-action-api.test.ts tests/phase-2-behavior-convergence.test.ts tests/source-readiness-deep-research-gate.test.ts tests/direct-delivery-operator-handoff.test.ts

must_record: deliverable-scope run records now persist topic_id and deliverable_id as durable identity fields
runtimeWatch fails closed when the requested quartet locator does not match the persisted or preloaded run identity
CLI review watch and MCP runtime_watch expose the same fail-closed mismatch behavior through runtimeWatch

audit/watch/review/projection surfaces remain aligned on source_readiness_summary, gate_summary, operator_handoff, and lifecycle_stage_summary while the run-boundary locator becomes machine-verifiable
must_not_claim: controller became a public formal entry
managed web runtime migration is now current repo truth
